category_sources: source_facts.description says chdig digs into ClickHouse with a TUI interface.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is chdig and source_facts.homepage is the official chdig repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; the README is the official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies ClickHouse inspection with a TUI; source_facts.executables lists chdig.
